figures.caption: Table 1: Different communication methods. The “Generic” and “Concise” baselines are noninterruptible, and the others are of different interruption strategies. Results are averaged over three speaker agents, and the full results can be found in Tab. 6. “SR” = Success Rate.
Table 6: Full Results for Tab. 1. Notations are the same. L8B refers to llama 3 8B, L70B refers to llama 3 70B, and L405B refers to llama 3 405B.
Table 7: STD for Tab. 6. Notations are the same. L8B refers to llama 3 8B, L70B refers to llama 3 70B, and L405B refers to llama 3 405B.
Figure 3: Sampling to estimate the expectation of communication cost and task performance.
Figure 7: Ablation on different thresholds and chunk sizes. “SR” denotes success ratio.
